title: Not Enough Guns
description: This mod adds guns to the game!
body:
## Explanation
Not Enough Guns is a mod that adds a variety of guns and matching bullets to Minecraft. The goal of this mod is to provide a simple ranged-combat experience without overwhelming the player. Each weapon has its own crafting recipe and straightforward mechanics, making them easy to use in survival or modded worlds.
More guns and features will be added in future updates.
## Who make the mod?
The only owner of the mod is erdemstandi and no other person has an authority on it, theres no helper. Just the mod owner
